title: BEM-637 dispatch queue
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
scripts=Path('scripts'); scripts.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
wfs=Path('.github/workflows'); wfs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
queue=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue'); queue.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
state_dir=Path('governance/state'); state_dir.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
protocols=Path('governance/protocols'); protocols.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)

# Queue entries for operational proof workflows. These are consumed by a dispatch helper workflow or by codex-runner once integrated.
entries=[
 {'queue_id':'bem637_run_claude_runtime_smoke','workflow':'claude-primary-runtime-smoke.yml','reason':'Need Claude primary runtime proof via workflow_dispatch because push from GITHUB_TOKEN may not cascade.','status':'queued','created_at':'2026-05-18 | 07:49 (UTC+3)'},
 {'queue_id':'bem637_run_curator_hourly_report','workflow':'curator-hourly-report.yml','reason':'Need live hourly report delivery proof via workflow_dispatch, not push-trigger cascade.','status':'queued','created_at':'2026-05-18 | 07:49 (UTC+3)'},
 {'queue_id':'bem637_run_direct_telegram_smoke','workflow':'telegram-direct-delivery-smoke.yml','reason':'Need direct Telegram channel smoke via workflow_dispatch, not push-trigger cascade.','status':'queued','created_at':'2026-05-18 | 07:49 (UTC+3)'}
]
for e in entries:
    (queue/(e['queue_id']+'.json')).write_text(json.dumps(e,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)

helper=scripts/'workflow_dispatch_queue_runner.py'
helper.write_text(sep.join([
'#!/usr/bin/env python3',
'import json',
'import os',
'import http.client',
'from pathlib import Path',
'SEP = bytes.fromhex("0a").decode("ascii")',
'QUEUE = Path("governance/workflow_dispatch_queue")',
'OUT = Path("governance/state/workflow_dispatch_queue_runner.json")',
'REPORT = Path("governance/reports/workflow_dispatch_queue_runner.md")',
'def load(path):',
'    try:',
'        return json.loads(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))',
'    except:',
'        return {}',
'def run_dispatch(owner, repo, workflow, token):',
'    body = json.dumps({"ref":"main"})',
'    conn = http.client.HTTPSConnection("api.github.com", timeout=30)',
'    headers = {"Accept":"application/vnd.github+json", "Authorization":"Bearer " + token, "User-Agent":"ai-devops-system", "X-GitHub-Api-Version":"2022-11-28", "Content-Type":"application/json"}',
'    conn.request("POST", "/repos/" + owner + "/" + repo + "/actions/workflows/" + workflow + "/dispatches", body=body, headers=headers)',
'    resp = conn.getresponse()',
'    raw = resp.read().decode("utf-8", errors="ignore")',
'    return resp.status, raw[:300]',
'def main():',
'    repo_full = os.environ.get("GITHUB_REPOSITORY", "bereznyi-aleksandr/ai-devops-system")',
'    token = os.environ.get("GH_DISPATCH_TOKEN", "") or os.environ.get("GITHUB_TOKEN", "")',
'    owner, repo = repo_full.split("/", 1)',
'    results = []',
'    QUEUE.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)',
'    for path in sorted(QUEUE.glob("*.json")):',
'        item = load(path)',
'        if item.get("status") != "queued":',
'            continue',
'        workflow = item.get("workflow")',
'        if not workflow or not token:',
'            item["status"] = "dispatch_failed"',
'            item["blocker"] = {"code":"WORKFLOW_OR_TOKEN_MISSING", "workflow":workflow, "has_token":bool(token)}',
'        else:',
'            code, preview = run_dispatch(owner, repo, workflow, token)',
'            item["dispatch_http_status"] = code',
'            item["dispatch_response_preview"] = preview',
'            item["status"] = "dispatched" if code in [200,201,202,204] else "dispatch_failed"',
'            if item["status"] == "dispatch_failed":',
'                item["blocker"] = {"code":"WORKFLOW_DISPATCH_FAILED", "http_status":code, "response_preview":preview}',
'        path.write_text(json.dumps(item, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False) + SEP, encoding="utf-8")',
'        results.append(item)',
'    summary = {"schema_version":"workflow_dispatch_queue_runner.v1","status":"completed","results":results,"created_at":"workflow_runtime"}',
'    OUT.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)',
'    OUT.write_text(json.dumps(summary, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False) + SEP, encoding="utf-8")',
'    REPORT.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)',
'    lines = ["# Workflow Dispatch Queue Runner", "", "Status: completed", "", "## Results"]',
'    for item in results:',
'        lines.append("- " + str(item.get("queue_id")) + ": " + str(item.get("status")) + " | " + str(item.get("workflow")) + " | http=" + str(item.get("dispatch_http_status")))',
'    REPORT.write_text(SEP.join(lines) + SEP, encoding="utf-8")',
'    print(json.dumps({"count": len(results)}, ensure_ascii=False))',
'if __name__ == "__main__":',
'    main()'
])+sep)

dispatch_wf=wfs/'workflow-dispatch-queue-runner.yml'
dispatch_wf.write_text('''name: Workflow Dispatch Queue Runner

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
  push:
    paths:
      - 'governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/**'
      - 'scripts/workflow_dispatch_queue_runner.py'
      - '.github/workflows/workflow-dispatch-queue-runner.yml'

permissions:
  actions: write
  contents: write

concurrency:
  group: workflow-dispatch-queue-runner
  cancel-in-progress: false

jobs:
  run-workflow-dispatch-queue:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Syntax check queue runner
        run: python3 -m py_compile scripts/workflow_dispatch_queue_runner.py

      - name: Run workflow dispatch queue
        env:
          GH_DISPATCH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.AI_SYSTEM_GITHUB_PAT }}
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
          GITHUB_REPOSITORY: ${{ github.repository }}
        run: python3 scripts/workflow_dispatch_queue_runner.py

      - name: Commit dispatch queue result
        run: |
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          git add governance/workflow_dispatch_queue governance/state/workflow_dispatch_queue_runner.json governance/reports/workflow_dispatch_queue_runner.md
          git diff --cached --quiet && echo "No changes" || git commit -m "BEM-637 workflow dispatch queue result"
          git pull --rebase --autostash origin main || true
          git push || true
''')

protocol=protocols/'WORKFLOW_DISPATCH_QUEUE_CANON.md'
protocol.write_text('# BEM-637 | Workflow Dispatch Queue Canon'+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 07:49 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'Problem: commits made by GitHub Actions with GITHUB_TOKEN may not cascade into push-triggered workflows. Operational proof workflows must be launched by workflow_dispatch through a dispatch queue runner using AI_SYSTEM_GITHUB_PAT when available.'+sep+sep+'Queue path: `governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/*.json`.'+sep)
state={'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_setup.v1','bem':'BEM-637','status':'queue_created','queued':[e['queue_id'] for e in entries],'runner_script':str(helper),'runner_workflow':str(dispatch_wf),'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 07:49 (UTC+3)'}
state_file=state_dir/'bem637_workflow_dispatch_queue_architecture.json'
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=reports/'bem637_workflow_dispatch_queue_architecture.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-637 | Workflow Dispatch Queue Architecture | PASS'+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 07:49 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'Created dispatch queue runner and queued operational proof workflows for workflow_dispatch launch.'+sep+sep+'Blocker: null'+sep)
record={'record_type':'bem637_workflow_dispatch_queue_architecture','cycle_id':'bem637-workflow-dispatch-queue-architecture','source':'gpt_architect','status':'queue_created','queued':[e['queue_id'] for e in entries],'state_file':str(state_file),'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 07:49 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as handle: handle.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
contour_state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: contour_state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except: contour_state={}
contour_state['bem637_workflow_dispatch_queue_architecture']={'status':'queue_created','queued':[e['queue_id'] for e in entries],'runner_workflow':str(dispatch_wf),'state_file':str(state_file),'blocker':None}
contour_state['workflow_dispatch_queue']='created'
contour_state['updated_at']='2026-05-18 | 07:49 (UTC+3)'; contour_state['blocker']=None
contour.write_text(json.dumps(contour_state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=proofs/'bem637_workflow_dispatch_queue_architecture.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-637 PASS: workflow dispatch queue created with operational proof workflows queued.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(helper),str(dispatch_wf),str(protocol),str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)]+[str(queue/(e['queue_id']+'.json')) for e in entries])
ops_applied.append('Created workflow dispatch queue runner to launch operational proof workflows via workflow_dispatch instead of push cascade')
"""
